payload.description:
## Problem
`get_required_sections` for binary classifier guidelines omits `Conditions for No`, which causes validation mismatches for correct Yes/No guidelines.

## Expected Behavior
Binary required sections include both `Definition of No` and `Conditions for No`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `get_required_sections` for binary returns `Conditions for No`.
- Validation output reports missing sections correctly for binary docs.
- Automated tests cover this requirement.
payload.title: Fix binary guidelines required sections missing 'Conditions for No'
